title: Suki Gifts International Galaxy Cosmo Bat Soft Toy (14397), Pink and Blue
availability_text: Only 8 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Keep Cosmo cosy by fastening their galaxy star patterned wings around their body with the Velcro tab or leave them open to show off their cosmic side!
Pink & blue cute soft boa bat with a stripy belly that glows in the dark & recharges with sunlight
Also available as a Backpack Clip Keyring
description: Product Description Suki's Galaxy bats are totally out of this world! These colourful creatures all have stripy bellies that glow in the dark and oversized eyes. Keep them Cosy by fastening their wings around their bodies with the Velcro tab or leave them open to show off their cosmic side. Safety Warning Please remove all tags before giving to a child
